Package com.hp.workpath.api.job

Provides interfaces for getting/monitoring job details

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    JobInfo.JobData
    Provides interface for specific job details
    JobInfo.JobState
    Provides interface for specific job state
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CopyJobData
    Copy Job details
    CopyJobState
    Copy Job state details
    JobInfo
    Provides the jobtype to distinguish print and scan, jobstate to get the current status and jobdata to retrieve job details.
    JobletAttributes
    The sets of attributes to determine to use a built-in dialog during job.
    JobletAttributes.Builder
    Builder for constructing the JobletAttributes to configure the Joblet.
    JobService
    JobService provides interfaces to monitor submitted job.
    JobService.AbstractJobletObserver
    AbstractJobletObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the submitted job.
    PrintJobData
    Provides details of PRINT job.
    PrintJobState
    Enumerations of the state for print Job
    ScanJobData
    Provides details of SCAN job.
    ScanJobState
    Enumerations of the state for scan Job
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    CopyJobState.ActivityState
    Copy specific job sub-states
    CopyJobState.State
    Copy specific job states
    JobInfo.JobType
    Defines job types of submitted jobs
    PrintJobState.State
    The states of print job
    ScanJobState.ActivityState
    Returns the state of scan activity.
    ScanJobState.State
    Returns the state of scan job

Package com.hp.workpath.api.job Description

Provides interfaces for getting/monitoring job details
